$schema_note: Claude Code .mcp.json for the chat subprocess (#650).
$comment: MCP servers exposed to chat-Claude. Installed at $CHAT_WORKSPACE_DIR/.mcp.json
- forge-api: HTTP bearer-auth against the on-box Forgejo API (issue/PR CRUD).
Token is read from $FACTORY_FORGE_PAT_FILE at tool-call time by the caller;
for Claude Code's HTTP MCP transport the Authorization header is rendered
from the FACTORY_FORGE_PAT env var which entrypoint-edge.sh populates from
- disinto-cli: stdio wrapper around /opt/disinto/bin/disinto. The wrapper
script is installed at /usr/local/bin/disinto-mcp by the edge image.
Nomad interactions are intentionally handled through the Bash allow-list in
chat-settings.json rather than a dedicated MCP — the nomad CLI + NOMAD_TOKEN
